reference: Hello, I was on the contraceptive injection for one year and three months. I cannot get premenstrual syndrome. I am already in my fourth month after the last injection, and in this fourth month, I had premenstrual syndrome once. Does this mean that I can get pregnant? My husband and I now want to begin a family! Please help.
text: Hello, I was on the contraceptive injection for 1 year and 3 months. I cannot get premenstrual syndrome. I am already in my 4th month after the last injection, and in this 4th month I had premenstrual syndrome once. Does this mean that I can get pregnant? My husband and I now want to begin a family. Please help.
